creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #13)

Already in progress and it will be a bit bigger since simple $CLEANJAIL change is not enough at the moment (maybe I forgot to include another required changes to the patch some years ago?)
Also, I'm not sure why jail.sh sees non-defined $CLEAN as 0 instead of empty value (most likely comes from line 10577 of common.sh). Though it won't work anyway as $CLEAN isn't a variable being populated from optarg and used in jail cleanup conditional.
